name: Jamaican Jerk Chicken Fingers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breast into strips.
2. In a baking dish, pour the orange juice and lime juice over the chicken strips.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
4. In a small bowl, combine the remaining ingredients (sugar, onion powder, crushed thyme, ground red pepper, black pepper, allspice, salt, nutmeg, and ground cloves).
5. Sprinkle generously over the marinated chicken strips.
6. Marinate for an additional 1 hour in the refrigerator.
7. Preheat the grill to medium heat with the grate set on the highest level.
8. Grill the chicken for both sides for 1 hour or until fully cooked.
9. Serve and enjoy the wonderful blend of spices.
Note: Servings depend on appetite and personal preference.
